scripts.build: node set-env.js && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R apps/frontend/dist/* dist/
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:api-main" "npm run start:api-python"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=apps/frontend && npm install --workspace=apps/api-main
